description: This file contains utility functions for standardized error handling and response formatting in an Express.js backend API. It includes functions to convert errors into a consistent ErrorResponse schema, map error types to HTTP status codes, and send appropriately structured JSON error responses.

methods.name: _toErrorResponse(err, fallbackCode, fallbackMessage)
methods.description: Converts an error object into a standardized ErrorResponse payload, avoiding sensitive information leakage.

methods.name: _zodDetails(zodErr)
methods.description: Extracts detailed information from a Zod validation error object.

methods.name: _statusForError(err)
methods.description: Maps various known error types and codes to appropriate HTTP status codes.

methods.name: sendError(res, err, opts = {})
methods.description: Public function to send a JSON-formatted error response with the correct HTTP status code based on the error type.
